title: Level 330.1
wikitext:
{{DISPLAYTITLE:Level 330.1: "Solitude Snow"}} {{CSS|User:WindXD/level.css}} {{CSS|content= :root { --theme-page-background-color--secondary:rgba(0,1,0,0.8); --theme-page-background-color:rgba(0,0,0,0.3); .backgroundplate img { filter: blur(5px); } }} {{Background|file=Level330-1.png}}
[[File:Level330-1.png|400px|link=]]
{{Quote|''Snow Of Serenity''
Lukewarm pool inside the hotel room, with windows display outside depicting a white snowfall. With each flake, a distinct light snow and a spark of intrigue fall from the void above. The snow that has fallen on the landscape has covered the structures; it's an expanse of little to nothing. The water is warm enough to cause steam to rise to the ceiling, generating water droplets that are clearly seen. As the temperature dropped, the chilly atmosphere caused ice to flash in portions of the structure.

The cold atmosphere and the magnificent scene on the snow-covered desert. The secret is that the beautiful state of serenity has a hidden sense of isolation and loneliness.}}
'''Level 330.1''' is a sub-level of [[Level 330]].
{{Class 0|color-h=205|color-s=15%|color-l=53%}}

Description
'''Level 330.1''' consists of a large hotel with several hotel rooms within, expanding through the endless snowscapes. The hotel is constructed of concrete in a contemporary design. The pool was filled with lukewarm water, much like the [[Level 330|Lukewarm Hotel,]] with a faint pool light shining. The window shows a peaceful view of snowscapes with distant buildings and bushes strewn about the area. The cold from outside caused the window to fog up, while the steam from the pool water inside left wet stains on the surrounding space. The place is empty, the water is silent, and all that is visible is the snow falling continuously and endlessly from the window outside. The low sound of a winter breeze blowing through the window cover was accompanied by the sound of lukewarm water flowing down the drain. The light from the window shines all over the room, creating the illusion of safety while hiding a sense of isolation and loneliness. The temperature in the hotel is quite low, particularly in the areas that connect to the outside area. Air conditioners scattered throughout the area cause the temperature to drop to practically zero. The extremely cold air circulated throughout the building, causing the environment to permanently drop down. When lukewarm water meets cold air, steam is produced in an attempt to warm the environment. Ice crystals may form on windows and other parts of the hotel due to the extreme cold outside.
[[File:Level-33.1-1.jpg|400px|link=]]
The Lobby
The main part of the hotel is the lobby, which connects to the exterior. The large room with the front desk in one of the corners. The lobby is an open area in the center with furniture, such as sofas, tables, chairs, and vending machines, placed around the corners. The lobby connects to corridors that lead to every area of the hotel and can even take you to a higher floor. The hotel lobby is decorative, with numerous ornamental items such as a plant pot, painting, mirror, lamp, and so on. Neon lights may be used to brighten up a space and embellish the ceiling and walls in various ways. Additionally, every hotel lobby has Christmas decorations as they evoke nostalgia. The presence of a pool is also well-recognized.
[[File:Level-33.1-3.png|400px|link=]]
Hotel Hallway
Hotel hallways connect every room in the hotel, contrary to the hallways in [[Level 330|Lukewarm Hotel]], which are patterned and duplicate themselves all the way up the structure's length. In the design, on each side are doors that connect to a hotel room line; however, a dead end with a window displaying a snowscape may appear. The corridor is desolate; only a light shines to illuminate the space. Air conditioners are scattered everywhere, which contradicts the current mood. Some hallways may lead to an exterior section of a hotel with a concrete or glass wall around it, with just a plain of snow and a pool with hot steam blowing up to the sky visible. The courtyard is also covered in trees, as can be seen. Some hotels may feature an open space in the middle that resembles [[Level 188|The Courtyard Of Windows]], which is an area surrounded by tall buildings with numerous windows.
[[File:Level-33.1-2.png|400px|link=]]
Hotel Room
Rooms at hotels typically include a pool inside that is filled with lukewarm water that is constantly warm, which contrasts with the present cold air. The shallow, lukewarm pool comes in different sizes. Pools can be as large as a room or as small as a small pool with plenty of space. Most furniture, similar to those seen at [[Level 330|Lukewarm Hotel]], is present in the area that was left, including bookcases, tables, chairs, beds, sofas, vending machines, and more. Some hotels may also have hotel bedrooms that do not include a pool and merely a bed to rest on, as well as other bedroom furniture. Some rooms may include separate spaces, which often include a pool and bedrooms. A few rooms may additionally open to a sizable balcony with a pool in the center. Near the lobby are other types of rooms, including restrooms, a gym, a sizable indoor pool, etc. These rooms feature windows that look into the interior.
[[File:Level-33.1-4.png|400px|link=]]
Snowscape
The vast, snow-covered grassy plain stretches on forever inside the white abyss. The light snow continues to fall as the soft, cold breeze flows down from the abyss. Over time, the thin layer of snow on the ground will pile up, creating impossibly high mounds of snow across the landscape. With each step taken, the expanse of the snow-covered land keeps growing and leading nowhere. Spruce trees and many more can be seen scattered over the snowscape, as well as a distant mountain covered in white snow. The light shines above the mountain but never shines down here, as the sky looks so natural but the ground is merely white. The color white spreads all around, covering everything in its path, as the temperature begins to drop. The landscape is generated at random since mountains and trees are placed at random and the land's elevation varies, resulting in valley landscapes. Because of this, some hotels may be at the top of the mountain and others at the bottom of the valley. Even though the landscape was created at random, it produced a stunningly unique view that was tranquil and white but nevertheless isolated and devoid of any signs of life.
Isolated Pool... I was wandering aimlessly through a lonely place filled with endless empty pools that reminded me of home. I walked into a room that was vacant. At first, I noticed that the room was much colder than normal since my body could feel the cold air flow pass by, and my vision was drawn to the glass door on the far side of the room, which was the sole point. Through the glass door, I could see what appeared to be a separate room but was actually a larger-than-normal room. I slowly approached it, depending on my suspicions, as the air began to become much cooler. I can see ice crystals on the door, which makes my vision blurry.
[[File:Level-33.1-5.png|400px|link=]]

It was quite cold as I put my hand on the sliding door handle, and when I opened it, frigid air rushed past me. As I keep making my approach to the room's center, I give myself an embrace. A breeze is audible throughout. The room is large, and I look around the lone room. It's quite chilly where I walk and tread. I feel physically and mentally tired as a consequence of these cold realities. When I turned to look for the source of the breeze noises, I saw a front door and what appeared to be a snowy landscape, with white snow falling continuously outside. Many dark trees can be seen in the distance, as well as mountains in the background. I sense comfort rather than irritation from the breeze. Although the surroundings were magnificent and peaceful, this place lacks any spirit or sight. I really want to go outside and explore, but the cold weather keeps me from doing so. The room appears to be the hotel lobby due to the counter in the corner of the room; the lighting is limited, leaving certain areas in the dark; only a Christmas tree decorated with neon lights attempts to brighten the environment. The Christmas decorations and gifts I saw gave the impression that they had been left behind in this cold place. The feeling of being nostalgic increases as I continue to search this area.
[[File:Level-33.1-6.png|400px|link=]]

I attempted to approach a warmer area by walking into the room's hallway, which was very long and had doors on both sides. I'm not sure where to go, so I immediately entered the one that's nearest. It led to a different large room. I could hear the sound of rushing water when I opened the door. I dipped my fingers into the sizable indoor pool and found that the water was pleasantly warm. I made the decision to stay here for a while since it keeps me warm, makes me feel safe and calm. As my body struggles to endure the cold air, there is a reassuring warmth. That soft warmth comforts me as strange white flakes suddenly stare at me beyond the window of my vision. I decide to soak in the water to keep my body warm. The lukewarm water creates vapor, which flows up to the ceiling and eventually fades out, leaving a wet mark on the ceiling. I put my hand on the window in front of me and rubbed it till a vast snowy scene appeared.
[[File:Level-33.1-7.png|400px|link=]]

The space is covered in snow, and it keeps falling over the void without end. As the dust started to cover everything in its path, the dark tree was covered in white snow. The sound of the breeze blowing the tree can be heard through the window, but it drowns out the sound of the lukewarm water flowing. I took a glance around and observed the surrounding mountain scenery. I can't see any buildings beyond the place where I am right now. The only thing I can see is the colorless white, which gives me the impression that it got left behind and I'm the only one remaining. The beautiful views of the snowy landscape are peaceful and calm, but they also leave you feeling isolated and like everyone has forgotten about.
[[File:Level-33.1-8.png|400px|link=]]
